verdict: Phase-30c per-bin permutation null (N=50): 0/8 bins reach p<0.05 against a length-matched shuffled null. Some length bins show no detectable bigram structure beyond unigram frequency — evidence consistent with the Phase-30a finding that the corpus is unusually deterministic.
